description_long: This object is a polygonal umbrella with a faceted, geometric canopy rendered in a muted blue color. The canopy is broad and angular, composed of several flat triangular panels that converge at a central apex, giving it a low-poly, modern appearance. The shaft is straight, slender, and dark, contrasting with the lighter blue of the canopy, and appears to be a single solid piece without visible joints or telescoping sections. There is no visible curvature or hook at the handle end, suggesting a simple, straight grip. The tip of the umbrella is blunt and unadorned, matching the minimalist style of the overall design. The umbrella lacks any visible patterns or decorations, presenting a clean, solid color throughout.
description: A low-poly, blue umbrella with a faceted canopy and a straight, dark shaft. The design is minimalist, with a solid color and no visible handle curve or decorative elements.
description_view_0: The umbrella is seen from a slightly elevated angle, showing the broad, faceted blue canopy and the straight, dark shaft beneath.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the angular profile of the canopy and the straightness of the shaft, with the canopy's edge appearing more pronounced.
description_view_2: A nearly frontal view, displaying the symmetrical, polygonal canopy and the central alignment of the shaft.
description_view_3: Another side view, similar to view 1 but from the opposite direction, emphasizing the geometric facets of the canopy.
